headline: VICI Properties Inc. Announces Release Date for Second Quarter 2026 Results
summary: NEW YORK, June 25, 2026--VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) ("VICI Properties" or the "Company") announced today that it will release its second quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday July 29, 2026 after the close of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The Company will host a conference call and audio webcast on Thursday, July 30, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET).

headline: There’s Big Money to Be Made in European Real Estate
summary: Though Henry Cabot Lodge III comes from a long line of high-profile politicians, he decided make his mark in finance instead.
